creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Roger Pau Monné from comment #11)
It looks like the two patches were committed but never MFCed:
https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=318bbb6d5a1eae77eb5dc687bcc63c0f99558e21
https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=1a12f0aea81b57d0dd2374047b8f4c97a037a8df

Shouldn't they be MFCed as well?
